name: Ham and Potato Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Potato, boiled, peeled and cut into 3-inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Combine flour, shortening, and 3/4 teaspoon salt in a large bowl; mix with fork or pastry blender until the mixture is the consistency of fine crumbs.
3. Gradually add water; stir until dough holds together.
4. Gather dough into a ball. Roll out on lightly-floured pastry cloth to a circle 2 inches larger than a 9-inch pie plate.
5. Ease crust into pie plate; trim and flute edges.
6. Sprinkle ham, potato, and cheese evenly over the bottom of the crust.
7. Combine milk, eggs, onion flakes, remaining 3/4 teaspoon salt, and pepper in a small bowl; mix lightly.
8. Pour mixture over ingredients in the crust.
9. Bake for 45-50 minutes, or until the center is set. Let stand 10 minutes.
10. Slice into 12 wedges.
